title: Go for great local golf facilities but don't plan on eating there.
text:
Best golf facility in Botswana by a long way. Well kept and presented.
However the restaurant is really bad, poor service, menu not accurate and didn't have 70% of what was offered on the menu. Got the order wrong, forgot about the drinks, made the wrong sandwich, couldn't work the till - hard to believe really.

title: Traumatic experience
text:
I had a very unpleasant experience where one of the staff by the name Sfiso, harassed me for the way I drove as I entered into the place, which according to him was too slow as he was driving behind me. The man followed me into the restaurant and harassed me, told me I’m lucky he’s at work otherwise he would have slapped me across the face. I was with my younger brother and sister and they will never forget such an experience. I don’t even know how to explain such behavior to them.

I asked for the manager’s number ( Joe) from the waiter who was taking my order  and upon calling her, she promised to do an investigation of which she called me back to say she has asked around and he (Sfiso) said he never said he would slap me… she apologized on his behalf and mentioned how she has known him for 10 years and how it is out of character for him, I don’t blame her, she was not present to witness this side of her colleague. I wish I recorded everything because this was a traumatic experience for me as a young lady of 25 years.

I have always loved passing by bluetree for their cake and burgers on my way home.

Now I don’t think I ever will for the fear of my safety. To anyone else, please be safe. Words come from somewhere. Especially ladies…. This man harassed me and threatened me. But because it seems nothing will be done about it … I had to write this in public. I don’t think the management will do anything about it unless I get hold of the owner of the restaurant. Anyone who can kindly help… this experience has really traumatized me in a way I can’t explain. I could never go there knowing this man still serves there.

🙏🏽

ownerResponse.text:
Good day 

I am deeply sorry to hear about your traumatic experience at our restaurant. 
This is absolutely unacceptable and we do not tolerate any form of harassment or violence from our staff. We take your complaint very seriously and we will do everything in our power to ensure that this does not happen again.  

We value your safety and your satisfaction as our customer, and we sincerely apologize for the distress and pain that you endured. 

We hope that you will give us another chance to serve you better in the future. Please reach out to us via email at marketing@bluetreegolf.co.bw. 

Thank you for sharing your feedback with us and for bringing this matter to our attention.
